falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would contradict the pattern's bearish implications and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses below 18 and stays there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a material reduction in market volatility, directly refuting the blowoff score's implication of imminent extreme volatility.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic policy shift would create immediate bullish momentum, directly contradicting the pattern's expectation of a bottoming process.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
